AI Stock Chat Assistant

Ask stock-market questions (US + India) or upload a financial PDF/TXT for deeper analysis.

Clarity mode
Response text
Beginner Path Step 1/4

Hello! I can help with core stock analysis and recommendations.

I can help with:

  • Stock analysis and market direction (US + India)
  • Financial document analysis (PDF/TXT)
  • Buy/Sell/Hold reasoning from uploaded reports

You can ask using US tickers (e.g., AAPL) or Indian tickers (e.g., RELIANCE.NS, TCS.NS).

What do you want to analyze first?

Paste CSV/lines in format: date,open,high,low,close

Need a quick example?

Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line.

Live Market News

Loading headlines...

Beginner Mode Guide

  • Turn Beginner Mode ON for guided prompts and a fixed learning sequence
  • Complete one step daily: Basics → Starter Stocks → Trade Plan → Weekly Routine
  • Use uploaded reports/CSV later once you are comfortable with the basics

How to get better answers

  • Include ticker + exchange and timeframe (e.g., INFY.NS, HDFCBANK.NS)
  • Ask one focused question at a time
  • Upload one report before follow-up questions

Example prompts

"Give me a buy/sell thesis for MSFT in Q2 2026."

"Compare HDFCBANK.NS vs ICICIBANK.NS for long-term investing."

"From this report, what are the top three risks?"

"Compare valuation and momentum for INFY.NS vs TCS.NS."
